Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Tony Hoare has died 1957 upvotes, 256 comments
  2. Where Some See Strings, She Sees a Space-Time Made of Fractals 69 upvotes, 8 comments
  3. Fungal Electronics (2021) 31 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Show HN: I built an ISP infrastructure emulator from scratch with a custom vBNG 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  5. Cloudflare crawl endpoint 448 upvotes, 177 comments
  6. AI Agent Hacks McKinsey 268 upvotes, 104 comments
  7. Temporal: A nine-year journey to fix time in JavaScript 264 upvotes, 106 comments
  8. Building a TB-303 from Scratch 184 upvotes, 73 comments
  9. Show HN: Open-source browser for AI agents 53 upvotes, 17 comments
  10. 5,200 holes carved into a Peruvian mountain left by an ancient economy 23 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. PeppyOS: A simpler alternative to ROS 2 (now with containers support) 59 upvotes, 21 comments
  12. Visualizing Ukkonen's Suffix Tree Algorithm 16 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Making WebAssembly a first-class language on the Web 184 upvotes, 87 comments
  14. BitNet: 100B Param 1-Bit model for local CPUs 239 upvotes, 120 comments
  15. Zig – Type Resolution Redesign and Language Changes 368 upvotes, 203 comments
  16. Writing my own text editor, and daily-driving it 196 upvotes, 103 comments
  17. Entities enabling scientific fraud at scale are large, resilient, growing (2025) 200 upvotes, 111 comments
  18. Faster asin() was hiding in plain sight 136 upvotes, 83 comments
  19. Show HN: Vanilla JavaScript refinery simulator built to explain job to my kids 40 upvotes, 19 comments
  20. Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world 584 upvotes, 470 comments
  21. Show HN: I built a tool that watches webpages and exposes changes as RSS 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Lego's 0.002mm specification and its implications for manufacturing (2025) 295 upvotes, 234 comments
  23. Wiz joins Google 102 upvotes, 76 comments
  24. Launch HN: Prism (YC X25) – Workspace and API to generate and edit videos 21 upvotes, 11 comments
  25. Show HN: Klaus – OpenClaw on a VM, batteries included 51 upvotes, 39 comments
  26. Launch HN: Sentrial (YC W26) – Catch AI Agent Failures Before Your Users Do 10 upvotes, 5 comments
  27. Searching for the Agentic IDE 15 upvotes, 16 comments
  28. The MacBook Neo 114 upvotes, 252 comments
  29. Swiss e-voting pilot can't count 2,048 ballots after decryption failure 64 upvotes, 139 comments
  30. Why the global elite gave up on spelling and grammar 58 upvotes, 143 comments

Last generated 3:00am, 12 March 2026. Source here.
